body.title: bin/superclaude: load igor.credentials.cfg instead of deprecated .env
body.result: require_api_key() now sources igor.credentials.cfg; setup wizard template updated to match
body.description:
bin/superclaude require_api_key() loads Igor-wild-0001/.env (deprecated, missing). Canonical credentials are in igor.credentials.cfg (D-installer-migration, migrated from .env). Fix: load igor.credentials.cfg in require_api_key(). Also check for ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL in credentials — if it points to OR, CC will route through OR.

**Affected files:** bin/superclaude
**Scope boundary:** Fix the load path. Do not change credentials.cfg.
**Completion criteria:** CC session has GOOGLE_STUDIO_API_KEY, OLLAMA_API_KEY, REAL_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in env after launch.
